case_title: NGUYEN, HA VAN VS CHIN, LEE NELL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, HA VAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, LEE NELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HA VAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, LEE NELL $2,739.09 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,754.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, LEE NELL
